name: @ant/claude-swift
description: A demo module that exposes Swift code to Electron
author: Felix Rieseberg <felix@felixrieseberg.com>

scripts.clean: rm -rf build_swift && rm -rf build && rm -rf bin
scripts.build:test: swift build --product NAPITestBindings && mkdir -p tests/build && cp .build/arm64-apple-macosx/debug/libNAPITestBindings.dylib tests/build/napi_test_bindings.node
